title: Dekton 1 PC 100 MM Tubular Double Hook | Durable Hook with Scratch-Resistant Plastic Coating | Ideal for Hanging Ladders, Bicycles, Tools, Hoses & Furniture | Rubber End Caps to prevent Scratches
features: Suitable for a wide variety of uses. Suitable for general purpose, workshop, automotive, crafts and hobbies. An essential part of your toolkit.
description: From the manufacturer Dekton products are manufactured to high quality standard. Dekton offer good value for money and several use features to improve the performance of our products. Our products are sourced with strict ethical and quality standards from around the world. Ideal for hanging bicycles, hoses, furniture, tools and ladders. Double hook with rubber end caps to prevent scratches. 10mm Heavy duty Rust resistant Dekton 1pc hook 10mm This hook is great for organisation especially with heavy step ladders, lumber, sports equipment, leaf/snow blowers, patio umbrellas and so on. Hook Heavy Duty Garage Storage Utility Hook Wall Mount Organizer Screw-in Multi-Tools Hanger Holder Hook Rigid design ensures stability and strength.
